dataList.title: Post-Heishou Choice Development
successDesc:
Relying on whatever they know about the Mao branch, {0} tries to convince the Heishous.

To our relief, that seemed to have been enough to convince them—the Heishous left the scene after handing us a Mao Bolus.
failureDesc:
Relying on whatever they know about the Mao branch, {0} tries to convince the Heishous.

But {0} must've said something wrong or suspicious, because no sooner had they finished listening to {0} than we were kicked out of there.

dataList.title: Oddly Familiar Boombox
successDesc:
{0} stealthily picked up the boombox.

We brought it to an adjacent street and hit the "play" button, blasting the alleyways with electronic dance music.

Nearby members of the Middle, alerted by the sudden burst of music, moved away from their stations toward that alley.

<The earlier path should be open now. Let's hurry through before they get back.>

We shut off the music and snuck back to the original road, which was now open.

With the path ahead cleared, we were able to pass through without trouble.
failureDesc:
As soon as {0} picked up the boombox, it began blasting electronic dance music loud enough to echo through the alleys.

Alerted by the sudden music, the Middle thugs immediately begin rushing at us.
